author: jdrbrn
description: Indexes references to scriptures in notes.

manifest.author: jdrbrn
manifest.description: Indexes references to scriptures in notes.
manifest.name: Scripture Indexer

name: Scripture Indexer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Actually add support for arbitrary chapter verse delimiters
- Add ability to exclude files and/or folders from automatic indexing

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Add support for separating chapter and verse using periods instead of just colons
- Updated indexing to reduce false positives (Such as Page 93 being detected Genesis 93)
- Adds user set delay to determine when a file is done be working on before automatically indexing
- Performance improvements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Made changes to work more efficiently

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Updated reference scraping to be case insensitive
- Minor changes made to match Obsidian plugin standards
- Now reloads index data when indexing single file in order to better support sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Enables automatic indexing by default
Automatic indexing now updates index when files are deleted, renamed, or moved
Removes dead references when re-indexing files manually or automatically

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fixes infinite loop on the index file when indexing on save is enabled
Removes unnecessary console logs
